title: NBA Daily Digest: Offseason Heats Up!
subtitle: Tuesday, July 21, 2026

items.headline: LeBron James' Agent Rich Paul: No Rush on Free Agency Decision
items.summary: The NBA world continues to await LeBron James' free agency decision. His agent, Rich Paul, stated that there's no rush, emphasizing it's James' choice to make. The MIA Heat, CLE Cavaliers, and PHI 76ers are reportedly the front-runners in the pursuit of the future Hall of Famer.

items.headline: Lakers Sign Defensive Ace Matisse Thybulle to One-Year Deal
items.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers have bolstered their defensive ranks, reportedly agreeing to a one-year, $3.3 million deal with unrestricted free agent forward Matisse Thybulle. Thybulle, 29, spent the last three seasons with the POR Trail Blazers, averaging 5.8 PPG and 2.0 RPG last season.

items.headline: Lakers Ink Summer League Standout Arthur Kaluma to Two-Way Deal
items.summary: Following an impressive Summer League showing in Las Vegas, the Los Angeles Lakers have reportedly signed forward Arthur Kaluma to a two-way contract. This move means one of the Lakers' current two-way players will likely be waived to accommodate Kaluma.

items.headline: Warriors Crowned Summer League Champions!
items.summary: The Golden State Warriors captured the NBA Summer League championship, defeating the Memphis Grizzlies in a thrilling final.

items.headline: Yaxel Lendeborg Dominates Summer League, Named MVP
items.statContext: Led Golden State to the Summer League Championship, scoring 21 points and grabbing 10 rebounds in the final. Averaged 14.9 PPG, 6.8 RPG, 4.0 APG, and 1.4 SPG throughout the tournament, shooting 48.4% from the field and 45.9% from three.

items.headline: Arthur Kaluma's Impressive Summer League Performance
items.statContext: Averaged nearly 19 points per game, shooting 61% from the field and 50% from three-point range in the Las Vegas Summer League, earning him a two-way contract with the Lakers.

items.headline: Lakers, Hawks Stalled on Jonathan Kuminga Trade Talks
items.summary: Trade discussions between the LAL Lakers and ATL Hawks for forward Jonathan Kuminga have reportedly not progressed. Atlanta sought the Lakers' 2032 first-round pick swap, which Los Angeles was unwilling to include.

items.headline: Cavaliers Exploring Trade Options for Jarrett Allen, Max Strus
items.summary: Should LeBron James opt to join the CLE Cavaliers, the team may look to trade center Jarrett Allen or forward Max Strus to create cap space and optimize their roster.

items.headline: Jazz's Walker Kessler Out for Season with Shoulder Injury
items.summary: Utah Jazz center Walker Kessler will miss the remainder of the 2025-26 season after undergoing left shoulder surgery to address a torn labrum.

items.headline: Injury Updates: Gueye, Aldama Facing Extended Absences
items.summary: ATL Hawks forward Mouhamed Gueye underwent surgery for a fractured foot and is expected to be re-evaluated in 3-4 months. MEM Grizzlies forward Santi Aldama will also undergo season-ending arthroscopic knee surgery.
